steps.title: Start With Workers
steps.description: Open Workers to add employee profiles, skills, and availability windows.

steps.title: Define Shift Demand
steps.description: Open Shifts and define time windows plus staffing requirements.

steps.title: Run Optimization
steps.description: Use Run Solver after workers and shifts are loaded.

steps.title: Save or Share Results
steps.description: Export Result for output, or Export State for a full restorable snapshot.
